behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the target file extensions/discord/src/monitor/provider.lifecycle.ts, the function drainPendingGatewayErrors, the flag lifecycleStopping, and the event type reconnect-exhausted, which covers the literals asserted in tests.
